wiki.summary: “ce” is the second track to Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis. As the name suggests, the title is a nod to his friend Connor, who’s nickname and Instagram ursername is ce. The distorted instrumental, courtesy of legion, consists of hits and glitchy synths, while hard-hitting bass and fast-paced percussion fill out the rest. A staple audio in Nettspend’s catalog. “ce” by Nettspend was produced by legion. Nettspend released “ce” on March 6, 2026. Read more on Last.fm.
